overall.description: Cinematic scene from a post-apocalyptic video game showing two survivors standing on an elevated concrete overlook, gazing at giraffes grazing in an overgrown urban plaza surrounded by reclaimed nature and distant skyscrapers against a mountain backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated concrete overlook of reclaimed urban plaza

agents.ego_description: standing still on the concrete overlook, quietly watching the giraffes grazing in the distance

notable_agents.action: companion character standing beside ego, observing the giraffes in the plaza below
group of giraffes grazing peacefully in the overgrown grass near the pond

entered.detail: Large beige government-style building with tall vertical columns and classical architecture
Broken concrete platform with cracks and weeds where the characters stand
Metal fence barrier running along the edge of the elevated overlook
Vast open area completely reclaimed by tall green grass and wild vegetation
Calm body of water reflecting the sky, surrounded by grass in the middle of the plaza
Tall contemporary office towers with glass facades rising behind the overgrown plaza
Distant mountain range with visible snow on the peaks behind the city skyline
Thick cluster of mature trees and bushes surrounding the edges of the grassy plaza

segments.scene_description: The characters stand on a broken concrete overlook with a metal railing, gazing out at a vast urban plaza completely reclaimed by nature. Tall grass covers the ground where streets once were, and giraffes graze peacefully near a small pond. Classical and modern buildings frame the scene, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high vantage point overlooking a reclaimed urban landscape that blends architectural decay with wild nature. It begins behind two characters standing on a broken concrete overlook, where a weathered metal railing frames the expansive view. As the camera gazes outward, the perspective shifts toward a vast urban plaza where tall grass has completely overtaken the former streets. The scene then opens up to reveal giraffes grazing peacefully near a small pond, surrounded by a mix of classical and modern buildings. Finally, the view expands further to encompass snow-capped mountains standing under a partly cloudy sky in the far distance.
